summary: Automated tooling detects roughly a third of WCAG failures; manual review is required for the categories listed in `manual_review_required`. The site scores 92% on mobile and 91% on desktop.

findings.evidence: aria-allowed-attr audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: No users are directly affected by this issue.
findings.recommendation: Continue to ensure ARIA attributes match their roles.

findings.evidence: aria-conditional-attr audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: No users are directly affected by this issue.
findings.recommendation: Continue to ensure ARIA attributes are used as specified for the element's role.

findings.evidence: aria-deprecated-role audit passed with no deprecated roles found.
findings.impact: No users are directly affected by this issue.
findings.recommendation: Continue to avoid using deprecated ARIA roles.

findings.evidence: aria-hidden-body audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: No users are directly affected by this issue.
findings.recommendation: Continue to avoid setting aria-hidden=true on the document body.

findings.evidence: aria-hidden-focus audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: No users are directly affected by this issue.
findings.recommendation: Continue to ensure [aria-hidden=true] elements do not contain focusable descendents.
